display.purpose: Page titles and primary headings. One per screen. Also used for critical health data values at large scale.

headline.purpose: Section headings and feature card titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, list item headers, navigation labels.

body.purpose: All body copy, descriptions, chat messages. Max 65ch line length.

label.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, field labels, badge text.

shadows.name: glow-indigo
shadows.purpose: Active states, selected cards, primary focus treatment.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle depth for modals and elevated panels.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Hover lift shadow for interactive cards.

motion.name: ease-ambient
motion.purpose: Slow ambient animations — orb drift, glow pulse (2–55s).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Trust Indigo fill, quietly powerful, no decorative elements.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; background: #6366F1; color: #EDE9FE; font-family: 'Figtree', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 14px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #818CF8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.6); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent at rest, lavender text, subtle border on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #A78BFA; font-family: 'Figtree', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(167,139,250,0.3); color: #C4B5FD; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(167,139,250,0.4); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Information tray. Flat at rest, indigo glow on selected, lift on hover.
components.html:
Metformin 500mg

Twice daily with meals
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,0.12); border-radius: 20px; padding: 16px; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card:hover { background: rgba(167,139,250,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card.selected { border-color: #6366F1; background: rgba(99,102,241,0.12); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.3), 0 0 20px rgba(99,102,241,0.15); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Figtree', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #EDE9FE; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #A5B4CF; margin: 0; }

components.name: Floating Label Input
components.description: Floating label pattern — label always visible. Placeholder-only inputs are prohibited.
components.css: .ds-field { position: relative; width: 100%; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px 16px 8px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #EDE9FE; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(99,102,241,0.6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2); } .ds-input.error { border-color: rgba(252,165,165,0.6); } .ds-label { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 14px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5B6785; pointer-events: none; transition: top 150ms ease, font-size 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus ~ .ds-label, .ds-input:not(:placeholder-shown) ~ .ds-label { top: 6px; font-size: 0.625rem; color: #A78BFA; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Navigation Tab Item
components.description: Bottom tab bar item. Muted at rest, Trust Indigo when active.
components.html: Home
components.css: .ds-tab { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 8px 12px; color: #5B6785; transition: color 200ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab--active { color: #6366F1; } .ds-tab-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-tab-label { font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Health status indicator. Always pairs color with a text label — never color alone.
components.html: On track
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge--success { background: rgba(110,231,183,0.15); color: #6EE7B7; } .ds-badge--warning { background: rgba(252,211,77,0.15); color: #FCD34D; } .ds-badge--alert { background: rgba(252,165,165,0.15); color: #FCA5A5; } .ds-badge--info { background: rgba(103,232,249,0.15); color: #67E8F9; }

components.name: Lab Value Display
components.description: Prominent clinical data value. Vital Cyan for the number, secondary text for context.
components.css: .ds-lab-value { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-lab-number { font-family: 'Figtree', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2rem); font-weight: 700; color: #67E8F9; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-lab-unit { font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #A5B4CF; margin-top: -2px; } .ds-lab-label { font-family: 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #5B6785; margin: 4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview:
CareCompanion exists for people navigating one of the hardest experiences life can produce: serious illness, their own or a loved one's. The design system's job is to deliver clarity under pressure. Not the false calm of a spa app, not the clinical density of a hospital portal. The Clear Horizon means: when you open CareCompanion, the fog lifts. You can see what matters, what needs to happen next, and that you are capable of handling it.

The visual language is dark, settled, and precise. Deep indigo surfaces absorb visual noise. Lavender accents surface information without demanding attention. Glass layers create depth without heaviness. The ambient orb system provides atmosphere — the quiet hum of a system that is always working, always watching, always ready — without adding a single click of cognitive load.

This product occupies a deliberate middle space: the organized intelligence of Linear, the human warmth of Calm, the flexible structure of Notion, filtered through the specific emotional demands of healthcare caregiving.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, settled palette built from deep indigo — warmth through tinting, never coldness
Tonal and glass layering for depth — no Material-style shadow stacks
Indigo and lavender as primary dual-accent: trust and compassion in tandem
Full semantic color vocabulary for health data (cyan for labs, emerald for success, rose for alerts)
Figtree display + Noto Sans body — personality paired with precision
Floating label inputs as the only permitted input pattern
Ambient orbs at the system level; precise, short transitions at the component level

rules.name: The Semantic Lock Rule
rules.body: Vital Cyan is for clinical data only. Clear Signal is for success states only. Alert Rose is for genuine alerts only. Status colors are never used decoratively.

rules.name: The Indigo Restraint Rule
rules.body: Trust Indigo appears on interactive elements only — buttons, links, focus states, selected items. Never as a background fill, gradient overlay, or decorative surface tint. Its scarcity is the point.

rules.name: The Figtree Boundary Rule
rules.body: Figtree handles personality; Noto Sans handles information. Figtree is not used for body copy, form field text, or data table values.

rules.name: The Data Size Rule
rules.body: Prominent health data values — medication dosages, lab numbers, appointment times — are set at Display scale in Figtree, colored with the appropriate semantic token.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Glow shadows appear only in response to state: active card, selected navigation, featured panel.

rules.name: The No Decorative Shadow Rule
rules.body: A shadow in CareCompanion communicates state, not position. Elevation stacks are absent. If a surface needs to feel elevated at rest, use a higher-opacity background tint, not a shadow.

dos: Do use CSS custom properties (--bg, --text, --accent, --border) for all color values
Do pair every color-coded status signal with an icon or text label
Do apply pb-24 (96px) to every app page container for bottom tab bar clearance
Do use floating labels on all form inputs
Do wrap all keyframe animations in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)
Do use Figtree for headings, Noto Sans for body text and data values
Do test every new component in both dark and light mode via [data-theme="light"]
Do keep <AmbientBackground /> in the app shell only
donts: Don't design like Epic or MyChart — sterile hospital EHR density is the exact opposite of this system's intent
Don't reach for generic SaaS dashboard patterns — no hero metrics, no blue gradient analytics templates
Don't gamify — no streaks, no score badges, no motivational copy
Don't use neon colors or aggressive glow effects
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively — glass is for elevated surfaces that need to float, not a default card style
Don't use purple or violet gradient backgrounds — gradient fills belong to primary buttons only
Don't center-align prose or list content
